revision.comment: Bot: mark 2 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天日腹大科度美神]]


{{infobox deity|
member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}
| type = Shinto
| not_children =
| not_father =
| not_consort = 
| not_mother =
|ignore =  is one of the {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|goodbye $1/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}.goodbye $1
| Name          = Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami
| Generation    = {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} 14th generation
| Predecessor   = {{ill|Nunotomidori Narumi no Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunotomidori Narumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| Successor     = {{ill|Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}
| Divine Order  = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}}
| Full Name     = 天日腹大科度美神 (Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami)
| Alternate Name= 天日腹大科戸美神
| Divine Rank   = 
| Divine Role   = Wind deity
| Mausoleum     = 
| father        = {{ill|Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|qid=Q135328864|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami}}
| mother        = {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|qid=Q135330271|1=Wakatsukime Kami}}
| Relatives     = 
| consort       = {{ill|Totsumachine no Kami|ja|遠津待根神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumachine no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135503290}}
| children      = {{ill|Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}
| cult_centre        = {{Plainlist|
* {{ill|Nihara Shrine|ja|日原神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihara Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Ōmori Shrine|ja|大森神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmori Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
}}
| Texts         = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}
}}
'''Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami''' (天日腹大科度美神, アメノヒバラオオシナドミ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|qid=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview ==
Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami is mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'' as the 14th generation deity of the {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}. He is a descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.
The name can be interpreted as follows:
- "Ame" (天): Heaven or divine origin.
- "Hi" (日): Sun or spirit.
- "Hara" (腹): Field or plain.
- "Ō" (大): Great or magnificent.
- "Shina" (科): Wind.
- "Domi" (美): Spirit or essence.
The name signifies "a great divine spirit of the wind originating from the sacred heavenly plains."{{Sfn|Nishimiya|2014|p=382|qq=}}
== Research and Interpretations ==
Due to its lengthy name, various theories exist regarding its meaning. Some interpret "Hihara" as referring to locations such as Nihara or Hihara, while "Shinado" is seen as either "the source of winds" or "a slope." "Mi" is debated as either denoting femininity or a term of respect. Scholars suggest that this deity, along with others in the lineage, represents a gradual transition from divine to more human-like attributes.{{Sfn|Nishimiya|2014|p=382|qq=}}
== Genealogy ==
[[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (from the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami is a descendant of {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}. His father, {{ill|Nunotomidori Narumi no Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunotomidori Narumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is the seventh generation descendant of Ōkuninushi, and his mother is {{ill|Wakajinzume no Kami|ja|若尽女神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakajinzume no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135503287}}. He marries {{ill|Totsumachine no Kami|ja|遠津待根神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumachine no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135503290}} and has a son, {{ill|Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyamasakitarashi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.
== Shrines Dedicated ==
* '''Nihara Shrine''' ({{ill|Maizuru|en|Maizuru|qid=Q750573|lt=Maizuru|1=Maizuru}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}})
** Principal shrine.
* '''Ōmori Shrine''' ({{ill|Unnan|en|Unnan|qid=Q877935|lt=Unnan|1=Unnan}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}})
** Dedicated to Amenohiharaoshinadomi no Kami.
* '''Nihara Shrine''' (Unnan, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}})
** Another shrine with the same name.
